rationale: No direct conflict. Educ. Code §29.934 governs resource campus designation eligibility and requirements. It references funding via Section 48.252 but does not mention homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13. Any revenue impact is indirect.
quote: A campus notified by the commissioner under Subsection (f) that the campus has been designated as a resource campus qualifies for funding as provided by Section 48.252 for each year the campus maintains approval to operate as a resource campus regardless of whether the campus is unacceptable or does not qualify under Subsection (b).
_note: Rule text concerns campus designation criteria and funding eligibility; no reference to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values.
